metadata.name: ore_por_program
metadata.description: ORE Proof-of-Refinement on-chain program — intelligently deploys SOL across all 25 ORE grid squares at end-of-round for maximum coverage.

instructions.name: refined
docs: **Refined** — leveling SOL deployment across ORE squares.
Strategy:
1. Read `Round.deployed[25]` and compute the average deployed amount.
2. Validate EV against the least-deployed (best) square.
3. Sort squares ascending by deployed amount.
For each square (least → most), deploy the difference between
that square's balance and the average. This levels the board from
the bottom up, maximising ownership share on under-deployed squares.
Stop as soon as `amount` is exhausted.
4. Collect a 0.5% protocol fee on the amount actually deployed.
Should be called when `slots_remaining <= remaining_slots` (last few slots
of the round) so the deployment cannot be front-run by late joiners.

accounts.name: signer
docs: The user who signs the transaction and pays for the deployment.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority = owner of the miner / automation accounts.
Usually the same as `signer`.

accounts.name: automation
docs: Automation PDA = automation_pda(authority).
May be uninitialized/empty — if so, ore uses the direct (non-automation) path
and draws SOL directly from `signer`.

accounts.name: board
docs: Board PDA = board_pda().
Holds current round_id, start_slot, end_slot.

accounts.name: config
docs: Config PDA = config_pda().
Required as account #4 in the ore deploy instruction but currently
unused by that handler (field prefixed with `_`).

accounts.name: miner
docs: Miner PDA = miner_pda(authority).
Tracks per-square deployment history and unclaimed rewards.

accounts.name: round
docs: Round PDA = round_pda(current_round_id).
We read `deployed[25]` from this account for EV calculations.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury PDA = treasury_pda().
Included for consistency with the checkpoint / claim_sol instructions
that share the same transaction; not accessed in this instruction.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program — needed for SOL transfers (deploy + fee).

accounts.name: ore_program
docs: ORE program — the target of the deploy CPI.

accounts.name: fee
docs: Fee collector wallet.
Receives the 0.5% protocol fee on every successful deployment.

errors.name: InvalidRoundAccount
errors.msg: Round account data is too short or malformed

errors.name: AmountTooSmall
errors.msg: Deploy amount is too small or all squares are at/above average

errors.name: InvalidPriceData
errors.msg: ore_price and sol_price must both be > 0

errors.name: EVBelowThreshold
errors.msg: Expected value per SOL is below the ore_refined_rate threshold — skipping deployment
